name: scaffoldfitter

metadata.name: scaffoldfitter
metadata.summary: Scaffold/model geometric fitting library using Zinc.

documentation:
# Scaffold Fitter

Scaffold/model fitter using Zinc.

Install with the following command:

```
pip install scaffoldfitter
```

# License

```
Copyright 2022 University of Auckland

Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
You may obtain a copy of the License at

    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.
```

modules.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterjson
documentation: Factory function for constructing FitterStep types from JSON Dict.

functions.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterjson.decodeJSONFitterSteps
documentation:
Function for passing as decoder to Fitter.decodeSettingsJSON().
Constructs scaffold objects from their JSON object encoding.
Used as object_hook argument to json.loads as a lambda function
to pass fitter:
lambda dct: decodeJSONFitterSteps(fitter, dct)
\:param fitter: Owning Fitter object for new FitterSteps.

modules.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep
documentation: Base class for fitter steps.

classes.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.__init__
documentation: Construct base class.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.setFitter
documentation: Should only be called by Fitter when adding or removing from it.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.decodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation: Decode definition of step from JSON dict.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.encodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation:
Encode definition of step in dict.
\:return: Settings in a dict ready for passing to json.dump.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.getGroupSettingsNames
documentation: :return:  List of names of groups settings are held for.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.clearGroupSetting
documentation:
Clear setting for group, removing group settings dict if empty.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param settingName: Exact setting name.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep._getInheritedGroupSetting
documentation:
---
param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
param settingName: Exact setting name.
return: Inherited value or None if none.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.getGroupSetting
documentation:
Get group setting of supplied name, with reset & inherit ability.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param settingName: Exact setting name.
\:param defaultValue: Value to use if setting not found for group.
Value falls back to value for default group if not set or inherited,
or defaultValue if not set in default group.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.setGroupSetting
documentation:
Set value of setting or None to reset to default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param settingName: Exact setting name.
\:param value: Value to assign, or None to reset. If the value is not
inherited, None will clear the setting. Caller must check valid value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstep.FitterStep.run
documentation:
Override to perform action of derived FitStep
\:param modelFileNameStem: Optional name stem of intermediate output file to write.
Base class for fitter steps.

modules.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig
documentation: Fit step for configuring subsequent behaviour, e.g. data projection settings.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.decodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation: Decode definition of step from JSON dict.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.encodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation:
Encode definition of step in dict.
\:return: Settings in a dict ready for passing to json.dump.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.clearGroupCentralProjection
documentation:
Clear local group central projection so fall back to last config or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.getGroupCentralProjection
documentation:
Get flag controlling whether projections for this group are made with
data points and target elements translated to a common central point.
This can help fit groups which start well away from their targets.
If not set or inherited, gets value from default group.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:return: Central projection flag, setLocally, inheritable.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.setGroupCentralProjection
documentation:
Set flag controlling whether projections for this group are made with
data points and target elements translated to a common central point.
This can help fit groups which start well away from their targets.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param centralProjection: Boolean True/False or None to reset to global
default. Function ensures value is valid.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.clearGroupDataProportion
documentation:
Clear local group data proportion so fall back to last config or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.getGroupDataProportion
documentation:
Get proportion of group data points to include in fit, from 0.0 (0%) to
1.0 (100%), plus flags indicating where it has been set.
If not set or inherited, gets value from default group.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:return: Proportion, setLocally, inheritable.
Proportion of points used for group from 0.0 to 1.0 (default).
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.setGroupDataProportion
documentation:
Set proportion of group data points to include in fit, or reset to
global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param proportion: Float valued proportion from 0.0 (0%) to 1.0 (100%),
or None to reset to global default. Function ensures value is valid.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepconfig.FitterStepConfig.run
documentation:
Calculate data projections with current settings.
\:param modelFileNameStem: Optional name stem of intermediate output file to write.

modules.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign
documentation: Fit step for gross alignment and scale.

functions.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.createFieldsTransformations
documentation:
Create constant fields for rotation, scale and translation containing the supplied
values, plus the transformed coordinates applying them in the supplied order.
\:param coordinates: The coordinate field to scale, 3 components.
\:param rotation_angles: List of euler angles, length = number of components.

> See create_field_euler_angles_rotation_matrix.

```
param scale_value

Scalar to multiply all components of coordinates.

param translation_offsets

List of offsets, length = number of components.

param translation_scale_factor

Scaling to multiply translation by so it's magnitude can remain
```

close to other parameters for rotation (radians) and scale (assumed close to unit).
\:return: 4 fields: transformedCoordinates, rotation, scale, translation

functions.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.evaluate_field_mesh_integral
documentation:
Integrate value of a field over mesh using Gaussian Quadrature.
\:param field: Field to integrate over mesh.
\:param coordinates: Field giving spatial coordinates to integrate over.
\:param mesh: The mesh or mesh group to integrate over.
\:param number_of_points: Number of integration points in each dimension.
\:return: Integral value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.decodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation: Decode definition of step from JSON dict.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.encodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation:
Encode definition of step in dict.
\:return: Settings in a dict ready for passing to json.dump.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.setAlignGroups
documentation:
Set whether alignment includes mapping mean position of annotation
groups in model to mean position of data for that group.
\:param alignGroups: True to automatically align to groups, otherwise False.
\:return: True if state changed, otherwise False.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.setAlignMarkers
documentation:
Set whether alignment includes mapping model marker positions
to data marker positions.
\:param alignMarkers: True to automatically align to markers, otherwise False.
\:return: True if state changed, otherwise False.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.setRotation
documentation:
---
param rotation: 'List of 3 euler angles in radians, order applied:'
---

0 = azimuth (about z)
1 = elevation (about rotated y)
2 = roll (about rotated x)
\:return: True if state changed, otherwise False.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.setScale
documentation:
---
param scale: Real scale.
return: True if state changed, otherwise False.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.setScaleProportion
documentation:
---
param scaleProportion: Target proportion of optimal scale to set, e.g. 0.9 scales
  to 90% of optimal size.
---

Value is clamped to be within range from 0.5 to 2.0.
\:return: True if state changed, otherwise False.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.setTranslation
documentation:
---
param translation: '[ x, y, z ].'
return: True if state changed, otherwise False.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.run
documentation:
Perform align and scale.
\:param modelFileNameStem: Optional name stem of intermediate output file to write.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign._doAutoAlign
documentation: Perform auto alignment to groups and/or markers.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign.getTransformationMatrix
documentation:
---
return: 4x4 row-major transformation matrix with first index down rows, second across
  columns,
---

suitable for multiplication p' = Mp where p = [ x, y, z, h ].

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepalign.FitterStepAlign._optimiseAlignment
documentation:
Calculate transformation from modelCoordinates to dataMarkers
over the markers, by scaling, translating and rotating model.
On success, sets transformation parameters in object.
\:param pointMap: dict name -> (modelCoordinates, dataCoordinates)

modules.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit
documentation: Fit step for gross alignment and scale.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.decodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation: Decode definition of step from JSON dict.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.encodeSettingsJSONDict
documentation:
Encode definition of step in dict.
\:return: Settings in a dict ready for passing to json.dump.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.clearGroupDataWeight
documentation:
Clear group data weight so fall back to last fit or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.getGroupDataWeight
documentation:
Get group data weight to apply in fit, and associated flags.
If not set or inherited, gets value from default group.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:return: Weight, setLocally, inheritable.
Weight is a real value >= 0.0. Default value 1.0 if not set.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.setGroupDataWeight
documentation:
Set group data weight to apply in fit, or reset to use default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param weight: Float valued weight >= 0.0, or None to reset to global
default. Function ensures value is valid.
Weight is a real value multiplying the data projection error. Higher
values for a group make the fit more closely match its data relative to
other groups. It is recommended that the default group data weight be
kept at 1.0 and other weights or penalties changed relative to it.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.clearGroupDataSlidingFactor
documentation:
Clear group data sliding factor so fall back to last fit or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.getGroupDataSlidingFactor
documentation:
Get group data sliding factor to apply in fit, and associated flags.
If not set or inherited, gets value from default group.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:return: Sliding factor, setLocally, inheritable.
Sliding factor is a real value >= 0.0 which multiplies group weight in
sliding directions.
Default value 0.1 gives some sliding resistance.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.setGroupDataSlidingFactor
documentation:
Set group data sliding weight to apply in fit, or reset to use default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param slidingFactor: Float value >= 0.0, or None to reset to global
default. Function ensures value is valid.
Sliding factor is a real value >= 0.0 which multiplies group weight in
sliding directions (two directions for surfaces, one for lines).
Default value 0.1 gives some sliding resistance.
Setting value 0.0 gives zero sliding resistance.
A small positive value \<< 1.0 may aid stability where there is
insufficient constraint from markers, line groups, multiple groups
and inherent shape.
Higher values increasingly apply stretch to the span of data points,
but also limit movement which can lead to tangential wrinkling.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.clearGroupDataStretch
documentation:
Clear local group data stretch so fall back to last config or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.getGroupDataStretch
documentation:
Get flag controlling whether tangential projections have the full
data weight applied to them to stretch the model to the span of data
with zero/low sliding factor. Default is True/on.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:return: Data stretch flag, setLocally, inheritable.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.setGroupDataStretch
documentation:
Set flag controlling whether tangential projections have the full
data weight applied to them to stretch the model to the span of data
with zero/low sliding factor. Turn off for groups such as inlet/outlet
tubes where specimens show quite variable length, so feature is oriented
with the data but keeps its length from the reference scaffold.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param dataStretch: Boolean True/False or None to reset to global
default. Function ensures value is valid.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.clearGroupStrainPenalty
documentation:
Clear local group strain penalty so fall back to last fit or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.getGroupStrainPenalty
documentation:
Get list of strain penalty factors used to scale first deformation
gradient components in group. Up to 9 components possible in 3-D, 4 in 2-D.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param count: Optional number of factors to limit or enlarge list to.
If enlarging, values are padded with the last stored value. If None,
the number stored is requested.
If not set or inherited, gets value from default group.
\:return: list(float), setLocally, inheritable.
First return value is a list of float strain penalty factors, length > 0.
If length is 1 and value is 0.0, no penalty will be applied.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.setGroupStrainPenalty
documentation:
---
param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
param strainPenalty: List of 1-9 float-value strain penalty factors to scale
---

first deformation gradient components, or None to reset to inherited or
default value. If fewer than 9 values are supplied in the list, the
last value is used for all remaining components.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.clearGroupCurvaturePenalty
documentation:
Clear local group curvature penalty so fall back to last fit or global default.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.getGroupCurvaturePenalty
documentation:
Get list of curvature penalty factors used to scale second deformation
gradient components in group. Up to 27 components possible in 3-D.
\:param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
\:param count: Optional number of factors to limit or enlarge list to.
If enlarging, values are padded with the last stored value. If None,
the number stored is requested.
If not set or inherited, gets value from default group.
\:return: list(float), setLocally, inheritable.
First return value is a list of float curvature penalty factors.
If length is 1 and value is 0.0, no penalty will be applied.
The second return value is True if the value is set locally to a value
or None if reset locally.
The third return value is True if a previous config has set the value.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.setGroupCurvaturePenalty
documentation:
---
param curvaturePenalty: List of 1-27 float-value curvature penalty
param groupName: Exact model group name, or None for default group.
---

factors to scale first deformation gradient components, or None to
reset to inherited or default value. If fewer than 27 values are
supplied in the list, the last value is used for all remaining
components.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.run
documentation:
Fit model geometry parameters to data.
\:param modelFileNameStem: Optional name stem of intermediate output file to write.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.createDataObjectiveField
documentation:
Get FieldNodesetSum objective for data projected onto mesh, including markers with fixed locations.
Assumes ChangeManager(fieldmodule) is in effect.
\:return: Zinc FieldNodesetSum.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.createDeformationPenaltyObjectiveField
documentation:
Get strain and curvature penalty mesh integral objective field.
Assumes ChangeManager(fieldmodule) is in effect.
\:param deformActiveMeshGroup: Mesh group over which either penalties is applied.
\:param strainActiveMeshGroup: Mesh group over which strain penalty is applied.
\:param curvatureActiveMeshGroup: Mesh group over which curvature penalty is applied.
\:return: Zinc FieldMeshIntegral, or None if not applied.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitterstepfit.FitterStepFit.createFlattenGroupObjectiveField
documentation:
Get flatten group penalty mesh integral field, if any.
Assumes ChangeManager(fieldmodule) is in effect.
\:return: Zinc FieldMeshIntegral, or None if not applied.

modules.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter
documentation: Main class for fitting scaffolds.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.__init__
documentation:
---
param zincDataFileName: Name of zinc filed supplying data to fit to.
param zincModelFileName: Name of zinc file supplying model to fit.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.decodeSettingsJSON
documentation:
Define Fitter from JSON serialisation output by encodeSettingsJSON.
\:param s: String of JSON encoded Fitter settings.
\:param decoder: decodeJSONFitterSteps(fitter, dct) for decodings FitterSteps.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.encodeSettingsJSON
documentation:
---
return: String JSON encoding of Fitter settings.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getInitialFitterStepConfig
documentation: Get first fitter step which must exist and be a FitterStepConfig.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.moveFitterStep
documentation:
Move fitter step from its previous index to a new index in the sequence, to change the order of steps.
If a fitter step that has been run is affected by the change, the model is reloaded and no fitter steps
after initial config are run. Can't move to/from index 0 which is initial config step.
\:param prevIndex: Previous index of step to be moved, 1 \<= index < number of fitter steps.
\:param newIndex: New index for that step, 1 \<= index < number of fitter steps.
\:param modelFileNameStem: File name stem for writing intermediate model files.
\:return: Boolean True if model is reloaded or False if not, index of end step.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getInheritFitterStep
documentation:
Get last FitterStep of same type as refFitterStep or None if
refFitterStep is the first.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getInheritFitterStepConfig
documentation:
Get last FitterStepConfig applicable to refFitterStep or None if
refFitterStep is the first.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getActiveFitterStepConfig
documentation:
Get latest FitterStepConfig applicable to refFitterStep.
Can be itself.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.addFitterStep
documentation:
---
param fitterStep: FitterStep to add.
param refFitterStep: FitterStep to insert after, or None to append.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.removeFitterStep
documentation:
Remove fitterStep from Fitter.
\:param fitterStep: FitterStep to remove. Must not be initial config.
\:return: Next FitterStep after fitterStep, or previous if None.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.load
documentation:
Read model and data and define fit fields and data.
Can call again to reset fit, after parameters have changed.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataCentre
documentation:
---
return: Precalculated centre of data on [ x, y, z].
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataScale
documentation:
---
return: Precalculated maximum span of data on x, y, or z.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._defineCommonMeshFields
documentation:
Defines fields for storing per-element strain and curvature penalties
plus active mesh groups for each.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._defineCommonDataFields
documentation:
Defines self._dataHostCoordinatesField to gives the value of self._modelCoordinatesField at
embedded location self._dataHostLocationField.
Need to call again if self._modelCoordinatesField is changed.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._loadData
documentation:
Load zinc data file into self._rawDataRegion.
Rename data groups to exactly match model groups where they differ by case and whitespace only.
Transfer data points (and converted nodes) into self._region.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.run
documentation:
Run either all remaining fitter steps or up to specified end step.
\:param endStep: Last fitter step to run, or None to run all.
\:param modelFileNameStem: File name stem for writing intermediate model files.
\:return: True if reloaded (so scene changed), False if not.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._discoverDataCoordinatesField
documentation: Choose default dataCoordinates field.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.assignDataWeights
documentation: Assign values of the weight field for all data and marker points.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.assignDeformationPenalties
documentation:
Assign per-element strain and curvature penalty values and build
groups of elements for which they are non-zero.
If element is in multiple groups with values set, value for first group found is used.
Currently applied only to elements of highest dimension.
\:return: deformActiveMeshGroup, strainActiveMeshGroup, curvatureActiveMeshGroup
Zinc MeshGroups over which to apply penalties: combined, strain and curvature.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataHostCoordinatesField
documentation:
---
return: Field giving coordinates of projections of data points on mesh.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataDeltaField
documentation:
---
return: Field giving delta coordinates (projection coordinates - data coordinates)
---

for all data points & data marker points.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataErrorField
documentation:
---
return: Field giving magnitude of data point delta field.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataRMSAndMaximumProjectionError
documentation:
Get RMS and maximum error for all active data and marker point projections.
No group weights are applied.
Optional nodeset group parameter allows the user to make the calculation over a different group
from the active group.
\:param nodesetGroup: Optional parameter to specify a particular nodeset group to make the calculation over.
\:return: RMS error value, maximum error value. Values are None if there is no data or bad fields.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getDataRMSAndMaximumProjectionErrorForGroup
documentation:
Get RMS and maximum error for the intersection of the nodeset group with
the given name and the active data group projections.
If the groupName is not a valid nodeset group name or the calculation fails
then None, None is returned.

```
param groupName

Name of group to make calculation over.

return

RMS error value, maximum error value.
```

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getMarkerDataFields
documentation:
Only call if markerGroup exists.
\:return: markerDataGroup, markerDataCoordinates, markerDataName

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getMarkerDataLocationFields
documentation:
Get fields giving marker location coordinates and delta on the data points (copied from nodes).
Only call if markerGroup exists.
\:return: markerDataLocation, markerDataLocationCoordinates, markerDataDelta

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getMarkerModelFields
documentation:
Only call if markerGroup exists.
\:return: markerNodeGroup, markerLocation, markerCoordinates, markerName

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._calculateMarkerDataLocations
documentation:
Called when markerGroup exists.
Find matching marker mesh locations for marker data points.
Only finds matching location where there is one datapoint and one node
for each name in marker group.
Defines datapoint group self._markerDataLocationGroup to contain those with locations.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._discoverModelCoordinatesField
documentation: Choose default modelCoordinates field.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.setModelFitGroup
documentation:
Set subset of model to fit over. Must be a group field with a mesh group for
mesh of highest dimension in model
\:param modelFitGroup: Zinc group or None for whole mesh.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._discoverModelFitGroup
documentation: Discover modelFitGroup from set name.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.setFibreField
documentation:
Set field used to orient strain and curvature penalties relative to element.
\:param fibreField: Fibre angles field available on elements, or None to use
global x, y, z axes.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._discoverFibreField
documentation: Find field used to orient strain and curvature penalties, if any.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.setFlattenGroup
documentation:
Set group to constrain to z = 0 (or y = 0 for 2-D coordinates).
Data weight for that group is used as weighting on integral.
\:param flattenGroup: Zinc group or None for whole mesh.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter._discoverFlattenGroup
documentation: Discover flattenGroup from set name.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.calculateGroupDataProjections
documentation:
Project data points for group. Assumes called while ChangeManager is active for fieldmodule.
\:param fieldcache: Fieldcache for zinc field evaluations in region.
\:param group: The FieldGroup being fitted (parent of dataGroup, meshGroup).
\:param dataGroup: Nodeset group containing data points to project.
\:param meshGroup: MeshGroup containing surfaces/lines to project onto.
\:param meshLocation: FieldStoredMeshLocation to store found location in on highest dimension mesh.
\:param activeFitterStepConfig: Where to get current projection modes from.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getGroupDataProjectionNodesetGroup
documentation:
---
return: Data NodesetGroup containing points for projection of group, otherwise None.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getGroupDataProjectionMeshGroup
documentation:
Get mesh group for 2D if not 1D mesh containing elements
for projecting data in group, if any.
\:return: MeshGroup or None if none or empty

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.calculateDataProjections
documentation:
Find projections of datapoints' coordinates onto model coordinates,
by groups i.e. from datapoints group onto matching 2-D or 1-D mesh group.
Calculate and store projection direction unit vector.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getMarkerDataLocationField
documentation: Same as for all other data points.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getZincVersion
documentation:
---
return: zinc version numbers [major, minor, patch].
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.getHighestDimensionMesh
documentation:
---
return: Highest dimension mesh with elements in it, or None if none.
---

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.setDiagnosticLevel
documentation:
---
param diagnosticLevel: 0 = no diagnostic messages. 1 = Information and warning messages.
---

2 = Also optimisation reports.

methods.name: scaffoldfitter.fitter.Fitter.writeModel
documentation:
Write model nodes and elements with model coordinates field to file.
Note: Output field name is prefixed with "fitted ".
